source_quote: There were 28 definite cases (1.0%) of incident VTE in the pravastatin group recipients and 20 cases (0.70%) in placebo recipients. Pravastatin did not reduce VTE in PROSPER compared to placebo [unadjusted hazard ratio (95% confidence interval) 1.42 (0.80, 2.52) p = 0.23].
reasoning: Binary outcome (VTE events). Both raw counts (28/2834 vs 20/2865) and HR with 95% CI are provided. Pravastatin is intervention, placebo is control.
